examples.title: Catch only the cases you can recover from
examples.description: A `when` clause keeps the recovery path narrow instead of over-catching and branching inside the handler.

examples.title: Log during the filter and keep bubbling
examples.description: Filters can record context before the runtime commits to a handler, letting the original exception continue upward unchanged.

relatedFeatures.reason: Start with Async and await when you want an earlier building block for Exception filters.
